read_only_probe.stderr_summary: No default API key first; MiniMax env mapping then returned 401 invalid api key

truth_boundary: Pi is callable as an external T-layer binary, but LLM-backed Pi execution is not yet available until a valid Pi-supported provider credential/OAuth is configured. No Pi code modification was performed.
next_actions: Configure Pi provider auth via /login or a valid provider env var/auth.json entry
Re-run a read-only probe before allowing write/edit/bash tools
Only then assign a scoped defect patch to T under O review and Vt replay
